instruction: I accidentally deleted multiple event assets. Recover only poster_party_night.webp and guest_list.txt from Trash into /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/, and keep old_note.txt in Trash. Also ensure recovered files keep their original content.
source: 外部参考来源：Ubuntu Desktop Guide - Recover a file from the Trash (https://help.ubuntu.com/lts/ubuntu-help/files-recover.html.en)

parameters.command:
cat > /home/user/Desktop/poster_party_night.webp <<'EOF'
FAKE_WEBP_CONTENT_PARTY_NIGHT_V1
EOF
cat > /home/user/Desktop/guest_list.txt <<'EOF'
Alice
Bob
Charlie
EOF
cat > /home/user/Desktop/old_note.txt <<'EOF'
keep in trash
EOF

command: import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5);

result.command:
poster_ok='false'; [ -f /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/poster_party_night.webp ] && poster_ok='true'; guest_ok='false'; [ -f /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/guest_list.txt ] && guest_ok='true'; no_old='false'; [ ! -f /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/old_note.txt ] && no_old='true'; content1_ok='false'; grep -qx 'FAKE_WEBP_CONTENT_PARTY_NIGHT_V1' /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/poster_party_night.webp 2>/dev/null && content1_ok='true'; content2_ok='false'; diff -u <(printf 'Alice
Bob
Charlie
') /home/user/Desktop/recovered_party/guest_list.txt >/dev/null 2>&1 && content2_ok='true'; trash_ok='false'; trash_match=$(find /home/user/.local/share/Trash/files -maxdepth 1 -name 'old_note.txt*' 2>/dev/null | wc -l); [ "$trash_match" -ge 1 ] && trash_ok='true'; echo "poster_ok=$poster_ok"; echo "guest_ok=$guest_ok"; echo "no_old=$no_old"; echo "content1_ok=$content1_ok"; echo "content2_ok=$content2_ok"; echo "trash_ok=$trash_ok"
